---
title: "Videos"
date: today
---

## Sammanfattning av kursmaterialet

Nedan följer en kort sammanfattning av de turer som ingår i en Steg 2-kurs.



### Slingshot

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden;">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Sbk1OpemJ8Q?rel=0&modestbranding=1&playsinline=1" 
        title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" 
        style="position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;"
        referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>

### Cut off/Hip catch

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden;">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0P8LqaoAjDQ?rel=0&modestbranding=1&playsinline=1" 
        title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" 
        style="position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>

### Whip med inside turn

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden;">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/GBvPa98is-E?rel=0&modestbranding=1&playsinline=1" 
        title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" 
        style="position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>


### Whip med outside turn

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden;">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0wadlC1IbrY?rel=0&modestbranding=1&playsinline=1" 
        title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" 
        style="position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>


### Reversed whip

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden;">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-Gzl3JaM0tg?rel=0&modestbranding=1&playsinline=1" 
        title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" 
        style="position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>

### Roll in roll out

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden;">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WRXAE61aZ2U?rel=0&modestbranding=1&playsinline=1" 
        title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" 
        style="position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>

### Double outside turn

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden;">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/D53-F-UOFts?rel=0&modestbranding=1&playsinline=1" 
        title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" 
        style="position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>
